name: Wellness Services Grid
prompt_context: A section displaying various therapy and wellness services in a clean, card-based grid. Each card includes an image, title, price, description, and action button. The tone is informative and caring.

content_schema.h2: string (Section title, e.g. 'Choose what fits you best')
content_schema.description: string (Introduction text for services, max 20 words)

services.title: string (Name of the service, e.g. 'Individual Therapy')
services.description: string (Brief description of the service, max 15 words)

image_hints: Select high-quality images that depict therapy sessions, group support, or wellness activities with a professional yet warm aesthetic.
